summary: Comprehensive testing of Safe-Spend Dashboard pages completed. All backend APIs (31 tests) passed. All frontend dashboard pages working correctly with real API data.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed data for escrow accounts, policies, and API keys
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dashboard pages tested and working: Overview (stats cards, quick actions, recent transactions), Escrow Accounts (list, create, fund, pause/resume/close), Spending Rules (list, create/edit with tabs for limits/vendors/approval), Transactions (list with status badges, detail view with 12-step rules evaluation), Approvals (pending/approved/denied tabs, approve/deny actions with modal), API Keys (test/agent sections, create with permissions, toggle/revoke), Audit Log (filterable table with event/actor/escrow filters).

dashboard_overview.details: Stats cards showing Total Escrowed ($1090), Total Spent ($60), Active Rules (4), Pending Approvals (1). Quick Actions and Recent Transactions sections working.

escrow_accounts.details: 7 accounts listed with summary cards. Create modal with name/description/initial funding. Action menu with Fund/Pause/Resume/Close options. Fund modal working.

spending_rules.details: 4 policies displayed as expandable cards. Create/Edit modal with tabs: Basic Info, Amount Limits, Vendor Controls, Categories, Time Window, Approval Rules. Toggle active status and delete working.

transactions.details: 2 transactions listed (Meta Ads pending, Google Ads approved). Detail page shows Transaction Info, Balance Impact, and Rules Evaluation (12 steps) with pass/fail indicators.

approvals.details: Tabs for Pending/Approved/Denied/Expired. 1 pending approval card with Approve/Deny buttons. Deny modal with reason dropdown and note field.

api_keys.details: Test Keys (3) and Agent Keys (1) sections. Create modal with key type selection, label, and permissions checkboxes. Toggle and Revoke buttons working.

audit_log.details: 63 events listed with Time, Event, Actor, Escrow, Summary columns. Filter panel with Event Type, Actor Type, Escrow Account dropdowns.
